subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! His honor Jalál, upon him be My glory, hath attained the presence of the Wronged One and hath been blessed with the honor of meeting Him. He made mention of thee, wherefore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی جناب جلال علیه بهائی لدی المظلوم حاضر و بشرف لقا فائز ذکرت نمود لذا
